span.p: P: House power out - circuit breakers tripped, wires broken in attic

span.p: A: Syd navigates to basement near fuse box

span.p: A: Dave uses tools to repair broken wires IMMEDIATELY while power off

span.p: O: Wires successfully repaired

span.p: O: Full power restored to mansion

span.p: P: Secret lab locked behind keypad - need access code

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: A: Deliver developed prints to Weird Ed in his room

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: O: Weird Ed confirms meteor plans visible - will assist in finale

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: P: Enter Dr. Fred's secret lab to complete finale

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: C5: Lab access requirements gathered

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: A: Navigate to dungeon area via green tentacle (feed wax fruit)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: A: Use GLOWING KEY + RUSTY KEY combo on padlocked lab door

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: O: Secret laboratory door unlocked

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: A: Enter memorized high score number at access keypad

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: O: Meteor control room unlocks - finale accessible

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: A: Deactivate power lever in meteor control room

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: A: Use YELLOW KEY to ignite rocket engine mounted on car

span.p: O: Meteor launches into sky - alien control destroyed
